questions.prompt: Which AWS machine learning service is best suited for adding real-time personalized recommendations to an application?
questions.explanation: Amazon Personalize allows developers to quickly build and deploy curated recommendations and intelligent user personalization at scale.

questions.prompt: You are training a model on Amazon SageMaker and need to optimize the hyperparameters. Which SageMaker feature automates this?
questions.explanation: SageMaker Automatic Model Tuning (also known as hyperparameter tuning) finds the best version of a model by running many training jobs on your dataset.
